scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build:bundle: rm -rf artifacts/api-server/dist/public && mkdir -p artifacts/api-server/dist && cp -R artifacts/tradevision/dist/public artifacts/api-server/dist/public
scripts.build: pnpm run build:client && pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:bundle
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
